title: Animal Garden - Porcupine
body:
This mod adds tamable porcupines into the game!

By default they spawn in forest biomes.

(You can change this and other spawn settings by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders or via resource pack)

 

Attackers will get poked by its quills if they are near the porcupine.

You can tame them by feeding them apples and bred them with sweet berries.

Sweet berries will also restore its hp a bit.

Their armor is increased by default to be more durable.


Mod Currently supports

**Forge 26.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6| 1.21.5 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.3 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Fabric 26.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Neoforge 26.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1**

 ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42a29b6e3547aa547798f3d8aa3ccf5da779deed.png)

 SEND ME A PRIVATE MESSAGE IF YOU NEED THE MOD IN A DIFFERENT VERSION OR IF YOU FIND ANY BUGS AT CURSEFORGE: https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects
